title: [FIRRTL] Type Lowering of subaccess op
body:
As part of type lowering, FIRRTL SubaccessOp should be broken up into per-element reads fed into a mux tree.
Fix for : https://github.com/llvm/circt/issues/656
This generates a mux tree for selecting the corresponding element from the flattened vector based on the index. 

Simple 1-D vector::
```
 x = a[index] 
```
is lowered to :: 
``` 
x = ( index == 3 ? a_3 : index == 2 ? a_2 : index == 1 ? a_1:a_0)
```
1-D vector of bundles
```
    input a: {wo: UInt<1>, valid: UInt<2>}[4]
    output b: {wo: UInt<1>, valid: UInt<2>}
    b.wo <= a[index].wo
    b.valid <= a[index].valid   
```
is lowered to::
```
   b.wo = ( index == 3 ? a_3_wo : index == 2 ? a_2_wo : index == 1 ? a_1_wo:a_0_wo)
   b.valid = ( index == 3 ? a_3_valid : index == 2 ? a_2_valid : index == 1 ? a_1_valid:a_0_valid)
```
2-D vector::
```
 x = a[index1][index2] 
```
is lowered to :: 
``` 
x = ( index1 == 0 && index2 ==1 ? a_0_1 : index1 == 1 && index2 == 0 ? a_1_0 : index1 == 1 && index2 == 1 ? a_1_1:a_0_0)
```
